CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-03-2011 CONTINUED TO JUL-15-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Plaintiff Julianna Agardi'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings (Even Case Number, Set In 301 In Error))
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF JULIANNA AGARDI'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

APPEARANCES: Julianna Agardi (no tel. #), pltf & moving party in propria persona; Vince Chhabria, Deputy City Atty 554-4674 for deft & opposing party.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES NUMBER 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, AND 10. SEE FPI DEVELOPMENT INC. V. NAKASHIMA (1991) 231 CAL.APP.3D 367, 384. DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE FACTS TO SUPPORT THOSE DEFENSES. MOTION DENIED AS TO REMAINDER. One order on motion for judgment on the pleadings and motion to strike signed in open court (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
